texto: Drawing things makes them seem more real and makes me feel more alive. It also makes me pin down and remember things - landscapes, season, weather, occasions, incidents, people - that would otherwise have melted from my memory.
explicacao: Citação de David Gentleman sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Drawing things makes them seem more real and makes me feel more alive. It also makes me pin down …” articula sabedoria, drawing, memory em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como memory.
